_notes: Source: hemas-organization (hospital). Target: US Core Organization. Source has mandatory licenseNumber extension, mandatory type and contact. Target adds US Core identifier slices (NPI, CLIA, NAIC) with error constraints, makes active[1..1], and adds granular address sub-element constraints. Source does not constrain active, identifier.system/value individually, or address sub-elements. Different extension sets.

drifts.description: Mandatory extension licenseNumber[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target. Source required this extension; US Core Organization does not define it.
Optional extension accreditationStatus[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.

Identifier slicing added in target: US Core adds named slices [NPI[0..* mustSupport=true], CLIA[0..* mustSupport=false], NAIC[0..* mustSupport=false]] with error constraints (us-core-16 through us-core-19). Source has no named identifier slices.
New MustSupport=true added on identifier.system at general level in target. Source has no constraint on identifier.system at this level.
New MustSupport=true added on identifier.value at general level in target. Source has no constraint on identifier.value at this level.
New mustSupport=true slice identifier:NPI added in target with error constraints us-core-16 and us-core-17. Source has no NPI identifier slice.

active min cardinality strictly increased and MustSupport added: source [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base, not constrained in hemas differential) → target [1..1 mustSupport=true]. Becomes mandatory in US Core.
Organization.type MustSupport removed from required element: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (US Core does not constrain type). Min decreased and MS removed.
New MustSupport=true added on address.line in target. Source does not constrain address sub-elements; US Core adds mustSupport=true on address.line, city, state, postalCode, country.
New MustSupport=true added on address.city in target. Source does not constrain address.city.
New MustSupport=true with new binding added on address.state in target: extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-usps-state). Source does not constrain address.state.
New MustSupport=true added on address.postalCode in target. Source does not constrain address.postalCode.
New MustSupport=true added on address.country in target. Source does not constrain address.country.
contact cardinality relaxed and MustSupport effectively removed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (US Core does not constrain contact). Min decreased and MS removed.
contact.purpose MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain contact.purpose. MS removed from optional element.
contact.name MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain contact.name. MS removed from optional element.
contact.telecom MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain contact.telecom. MS removed from optional element.
New MustSupport=true added on telecom.system in target. Source has telecom[mustSupport=true] but does not constrain telecom.system; US Core adds mustSupport=true on telecom.system and telecom.value.
New MustSupport=true added on telecom.value in target. Source has telecom[mustSupport=true] but does not constrain telecom.value.
